accommodations.text: Allow scheduled sensory breaks of up to five minutes.
accommodations.source_quote: Allow scheduled sensory breaks of up to five minutes.

accommodations.text: Pair auditory alerts and directions with a visual cue.
accommodations.source_quote: Pair auditory alerts and directions with a visual cue.

accommodations.text: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.
accommodations.source_quote: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.

accommodations.text: Face the student when speaking and avoid covering the mouth.
accommodations.source_quote: Face the student when speaking and avoid covering the mouth.

accommodations.text: Provide a checklist to break long assignments into steps.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide a checklist to break long assignments into steps.

accommodations.text: Provide a copy of teacher notes.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide a copy of teacher notes.

accommodations.text: Allow a four-function calculator on non-calculation-skill tasks.
accommodations.source_quote: Allow a four-function calculator on non-calculation-skill tasks.

accommodations.text: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.
accommodations.source_quote: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy: 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Speech-language pathologist.

goals.text: Oscar will maintain a topic across three conversational turns in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Maintains a topic for one turn in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Oscar will maintain a topic across three conversational turns in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Accepts a change in routine in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.
goals.baseline: Joins a peer activity with adult prompting in 1 of 4 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.

goals.text: Diego will solve two-step equations with 80% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
goals.source_quote: Diego will solve two-step equations with 80% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
